'''Dreeka''' were a kind of fish native to [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. They were often fried and eaten. [[Zovius Mendu]] once hid from [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Feln]] in a crate of dried dreeka fish. They were known for their distinct chirping sound.

==Appearances==
*{{KOTORbackups|0}} {{Mo}}
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 3|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 3]] {{Mo}}
*{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/interference20090929.html|text="Interference"|int=Interference|newhost=Suvudu}} {{Mo}}
*{{StoryCite|story=The Sand Tender: The Hammerhead's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}
